laserllama-alt-artificer-junker.DeleteEffectContent: Also delete the Piloting Rig active effect from this actor?
laserllama-alt-artificer-junker.EditWhilePilotingContent:
Warning: Changes made to the character may be lost when they stop piloting their rig.

We strongly suggest you cancel this edit, stop piloting the rig, and then make any changes.

If you want to make changes to the rig itself, these can be done by adding changes to the “Piloting Rig” effect in the effects tab. Changes added to the “Piloting Rig” effect will only be applied when piloting the rig.

You may dismiss this warning by clicking “Continue editing” below.
laserllama-alt-artificer-junker.SettingArtificerIdentifierHint: The class identifier used to find the Artificer class on the actor. Change this if you use a different Artificer homebrew. Defaults to 'alternate-artificer'.
laserllama-alt-artificer-junker.SettingApplyRigStatsHint: When enabled, a 'Rig Stats' active effect is created on the actor when piloting starts, overriding their ability scores, AC, movement, and traits with the rig's values.
laserllama-alt-artificer-junker.SettingFullyAuthoritativeStatsHint: When enabled (and Apply Rig Stats is also enabled), additional effect changes zero out any pilot values that might bleed through, such as unused movement types and AC formula overrides.
laserllama-alt-artificer-junker.SettingResizeTokensHint: When enabled, the actor's token is resized to Large (2×2) when piloting starts and restored to its original size when piloting ends.
laserllama-alt-artificer-junker.SettingAddRigFeaturesHint: When enabled, the rig's features and actions are added to the actor's item list when piloting starts and removed when piloting ends.
